items.title: Human-AI Collective Intelligence
items.summary: Current work on intelligent systems that augment human capability, support collective intelligence, and help shape more meaningful AI-enabled labor.
contributions: Exploring how robotics and AI systems can move from autonomy-only optimization toward human-centered augmentation.
Connecting technical system design with questions of collaboration, workforce empowerment, and collective performance.
Building on prior systems and autonomy research to inform broader human-AI environments.

items.title: Autonomous Mini-bus
items.summary: Development of an autonomous mini-bus platform for on-demand shuttle services in geofenced environments.
contributions: Led technical design across hardware layout, sensing, and autonomous driving software.
Worked across perception, HD mapping, localization, planning, and control as an integrated stack.
Extended deployment-oriented autonomy beyond simulation into operational service scenarios.

items.title: Autonomous Road Sweeper
items.summary: A full autonomous cleaning platform for mixed indoor and outdoor environments, from drive-by-wire retrofitting to full-stack software.
contributions: Led the development of the autonomous road sweeper prototype as the project lead.
Built a complete autonomy stack spanning perception, HD map, localization, planning, and control.
Transferred the prototype and software system to the Kärcher Robotics team for commercialization.

items.title: DriveSceneGen
items.summary: A generative simulation system that produces diverse and realistic driving scenarios from scratch for autonomous vehicle development and evaluation.
contributions: Helped push research beyond downstream planning toward data generation and scenario diversity.
Connected generative modeling with the needs of safety validation and realistic autonomy development.
Released code and project materials alongside the publication.

items.title: Autonomous Golf Buggies
items.summary: A fleet autonomy project for mobility-on-demand in an intra-fab environment, combining drive-by-wire design, software architecture, planning, control, and onboard interfaces.
contributions: Led a seven-intern team and designed the overall software architecture.
Built drive-by-wire and the autonomy hardware stack from scratch.
Implemented perception, HD map representation, trajectory planning, model predictive control, and user interface components.
